timeline.sourceText: The Fantastic Four: First Steps (1960s but part of multiverse, watch here or later on)
Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings
Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special
The Fantastic Four: First Steps (1960s but part of the multiverse, watch here if didnt watch it earlier on)
Vision Quest (Expected Late 2026, likely right before Doomsday - not sure on placement yet)
